case_title: VIRGILIO MERINO-HERNANDEZ VS. JUAN G. ESCOBAR

ORDER (SC-225) ON DECLARATION OF DEFAULT IN PAYMENTS. THE COURT WILL MAKE ORDERS ON THE MATTER AFTER HEARING.

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF OCT-23-2014 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES TO DEC-04-2014 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. "JUDGMENT DEBTOR GIVES JUDGMENT CREDITOR TODAY IN COURT A CASHIER'S CHECK IN THE AMOUNT OF $600.00 AND PROMISES TO PAY JUDGMENT CREDITOR $1200 ON NOVEMBER 15, 2014. IF JUDGMENT DEBTOR MAKES THE $1200 PAYMENT, ORDER REINSTATEMENT OF THE INSTALLMENT PAYMENT PLAN ", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. BENCH LETTER ISSUED ON 9/29/14 IS RECALLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAY-28-2015 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES FOR PROGESS REPORT TO JUL-02-2015 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. "JUDGMENT DEBTOR PROMISES TO PAY $500 IN A COUPLE OF WEEKS AND PAYS $500 IN COURT TODAY. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF TO FILE SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, WHEN ALL SUM OWED IS PAID. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. BENCH LETTER ISSUED ON 4/30/15 IS RECALLED. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---JOSE LORENCILLO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT JUAN G. ESCOBAR. NO APPEARANCES. CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER THE MAY 28, 2015 ORDER. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MERINO-HERNANDEZ, VIRGILIO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESCOBAR, JUAN G. DBA G.E. TOWING AUTO REPAIR & BODY SHOP $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,090.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT ESCOBAR, JUAN G. DBA G.E. TOWING AUTO REPAIR & BODY SHOP HEARING SET FOR JAN-06-2014 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAR-24-2014 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-29-2014 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. BENCH LETTER ISSUED ON FEBRUARY 24, 2014 IS WITHDRAWN. CASE TO CONTINUE FOR ANOTHER SIX MONTHS UNTIL MONDAY MARCH 30, 2015. DEBTOR TO PAY CREDITOR $300 STARTING APRIL 15, 2014 UNTIL JUDGMENT IS PAID IN FULL. LAST PAYMENT DUE ON MARCH 15, 2015; IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. CREDITOR WILL FILE A SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT BY MARCH 30, 2015 AND MAIL A COPY TO THE DEBTOR. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
